title: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, PWHT of Piping Spools for AL TAWEELAH ALUMINA
content:
Project Name: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, PWHT of Piping Spools for AL TAWEELAH ALUMINA.
Client: EMIRATES GLOBAL ALUMINIUM (EGA).
Project code: 4020022 & 4020032.
Description: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, PWHT of Piping Spools for Unit 1 & Unit 2 (3400 Inch Dia).
Location: ABU DHABI.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.
Market sector: Metal Mineral Refining.
Status: Ongoing.
Duration: April 2020 – October 2020.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
